# zabbix_service (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the service.

### Optional

- `algorithm` (Number) Service status calculation algorithm. 0=none, 1=worst child, 2=best child.
- `children` (Set of String) Child service IDs.
- `description` (String) Service description.
- `parents` (Set of String) Parent service IDs.
- `problem_tag` (Block List) Problem tag filters for the service. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--problem_tag))
- `propagation_rule` (Number) Propagation rule to parent service. 0=as-is, 1=increase, 2=decrease, 3=ignore, 4=fixed.
- `propagation_value` (Number) Propagation value used with propagation_rule.
- `sortorder` (Number) Service sort order among siblings.
- `status_rule` (Block List) Service status rules. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--status_rule))
- `tag` (Block List) Service tags. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--tag))
- `weight` (Number) Service weight used by status rule calculations.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number) Creation time as Unix timestamp (read-only).
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (Number) Current service status as calculated by Zabbix.
- `uuid` (String) Service UUID (read-only).

<a id="nestedblock--problem_tag"></a>
### Nested Schema for `problem_tag`

Required:

- `tag` (String)

Optional:

- `operator` (Number)
- `value` (String)


<a id="nestedblock--status_rule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status_rule`

Required:

- `limit_n` (Number)
- `limit_s` (Number)
- `new_status` (Number)
- `type` (Number)


<a id="nestedblock--tag"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tag`

Required:

- `tag` (String)

Optional:

- `value` (String)
